title: Hypothesis Testing Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps and decision-making process in statistical hypothesis testing, from stating hypotheses to making a final conclusion.
relationships: Sequential flow from one step to the next, with a decision point after 'Calculate Test Statistic' that leads to either 'Reject H₀' or 'Fail to Reject H₀' based on comparison to the critical region or p-value
